description: A screenshot of an email notification received on "Mi 25.10.2023 20:14" from "Copernicus Land Monitoring Service <copernicus@eea.europa.eu>" with the subject "Your download is ready!". The email states: "Hello, Requested data **159773967** can be downloaded. Please use the following URL to begin the download https://copernicus-fme.eea.europa.eu/clmsdatadownload/results/18447.zip". The "Datasets" section specifies: "Imperviousness Density 2018 (raster 10 m and 100 m), Europe, 3-yearly - Pre-packaged". The email is an auto-generated message delivered because the user associated with the email address requested a download, and is signed "Best regards, Copernicus Land Monitoring Service".
